anomaly_probe.anomaly_candidate: Dogen practice-realization, radical Other Power in Tannisho, inherited communal religion, and successful ordinary ethical practice without a marked peak experience.
anomaly_probe.confidence_effect: Prevents candidate-discovery status. The model is useful as a heuristic only if it can code no-threshold, no-peak, Other Power, inherited practice, and practice-realization without forcing them into a modern after-experience frame.
anomaly_probe.why_it_breaks_or_strains_model: These cases resist the sequence of method, result, and return. Dogen makes practice and realization inseparable. Tannisho relocates efficacy to Amida's Vow and can make nembutsu non-practice from the practitioner's side. Inherited religion may not have a discrete completion event. Ordinary ethical formation may return without peak experience at all.

claim_units: Practice completion should be judged by return to ordinary conduct, not by peak experience alone.
Completion has two pressures: whether the result stands or is undermined, and whether the method is retained, released, or embodied.

Different primary texts model different endings: MN 22 releases the raft after right use, Heart Sutra negates attainment while retaining reliance, Mandukya allows a known Self, Rinzai koan work exhausts ordinary thinking while remaining curriculum, and Dogen collapses before and after through practice-realization.
The target modern problem is achievement-contingent self-worth, burnout, and compulsive conversion of every result into identity.
The target cohort is stable adults who already use practice, study, work, prayer, or reflection and tend to turn outcomes into pride, shame, comparison, or status.

Non-fit cases include acute crisis, severe depression, addiction withdrawal, dissociation, trauma activation, scrupulosity, destabilizing meditation experiences, and people under explicit teacher, vow, or clinical instructions.

cross_domain_prediction.prediction: In music, surgery, athletics, or software apprenticeship, scaffold-retain, scaffold-release, and scaffold-embody patterns will predict different coaching warnings and transition failures better than skill level alone.
cross_domain_prediction.structural_translation: A learning method is not complete when it produces a peak performance or test score. It is complete when the learner knows whether to keep the scaffold, remove it, or embody it as fluent conduct.
cross_domain_prediction.would_count_against_it: Transition failures are fully explained by task difficulty, talent, hours practiced, and supervisor quality, with no added value from scaffold-retain, release, or embody coding.

exact_claim: A practice is not complete when it gives a person an experience. It is complete only when it teaches the person how to return to ordinary life. The return test asks whether the method lets the result stand or undermines the claim to have a result, and whether the method should be kept, set down, or carried as conduct. The practical danger is turning method or insight into proof of worth, or abandoning the method before it has trained ordinary conduct.

falsifiable_predictions.expected_observation: Manuals or teachers whose methods are coded as retained after insight will prescribe different warnings and return duties than those coded as released or embodied, even within the same broad tradition.
falsifiable_predictions.if_model_is_right: The two-pressure return grid has predictive value beyond broad tradition labels.
falsifiable_predictions.test_surface: Split-source blind coding of primary instruction passages, held-out warnings, teacher interviews, and inter-rater reliability.
falsifiable_predictions.would_weaken_or_falsify: Warnings and return duties are better predicted by institution type, teacher style, intensity, clinical risk, or ordinary moral teaching than by the two-pressure grid.

falsifiable_predictions.expected_observation: After two weeks, stable adults using the check report lower pride, shame, comparison, and post-result rumination, with equal or improved ordinary responsibility.
falsifiable_predictions.if_model_is_right: The Return Check helps achievement-contingent practitioners avoid turning practice into self-proof.
falsifiable_predictions.test_surface: Small randomized pilot comparing Return Check, generic journaling, and rest-and-plan controls.
falsifiable_predictions.would_weaken_or_falsify: The check increases rumination, self-surveillance, spiritual pride, avoidance of work, or contempt for ordinary achievement, or performs no better than a simple rest-and-plan prompt.

falsifiable_predictions.expected_observation: Practitioners trained in Advaita inquiry, Prajnaparamita practice, raft-style early Buddhist training, and Soto practice-realization will describe different appropriate relations to insight: stable recognition, resisted attainment, released tool, or ongoing practice-conduct identity.
falsifiable_predictions.if_model_is_right: Cross-training will expose different return grammars.
falsifiable_predictions.test_surface: Dual-trained practitioner interviews and behavior-coded follow-up after comparable retreat experiences.
falsifiable_predictions.would_weaken_or_falsify: Practitioners converge on the same return rule after controlling for teacher and personality, or differences reduce to vocabulary without behavioral, warning, or repair consequences.

literature_search_queries: "raft simile" "not for holding onto" MN 22 method release
"Heart Sutra" "no attainment" "rely on Prajnaparamita" method retained
"Snakes and Ladders" "Nagarjuna" "Wittgenstein" therapeutic method no thesis
"Mystical Languages of Unsaying" apophatic method self-consuming discourse
"after enlightenment" "return to marketplace" oxherding ordinary conduct

near_neighbors.difference: The candidate broadens the raft logic into a three-way return rubric and applies it to achievement-contingent self-worth.
near_neighbors.novelty_impact: Strong downgrade. The release side is known.
near_neighbors.overlap: Direct primary near-neighbor. It already gives a method-use test: use the raft to cross, then do not carry it as possession.

near_neighbors.difference: The candidate treats this as one cell in a comparative rubric rather than as Mahayana teaching in its own right.
near_neighbors.novelty_impact: Downgrades novelty but supports the model's refusal to make raft-release universal.
near_neighbors.overlap: Very close for the category of undermined attainment with retained reliance. It denies attainment yet keeps Prajnaparamita and mantra operative.

near_neighbors.difference: The candidate makes Dogen an anomaly inside a return model, whereas Dogen may reject the whole before, peak, after sequence.
near_neighbors.novelty_impact: Lowers confidence. If Dogen is central rather than marginal, the return test may be only an external heuristic.
near_neighbors.overlap: Close anomaly and near-neighbor. Dogen's practice-realization already says practice is not a means to a later result and realization is not an object privately recognized after practice.
near_neighbors.source: Dogen Bendowa material, Everyday Zen Foundation, https://everydayzen.org/teachings/dogens-bendowa-part-2-of-3/

near_neighbors.difference: The candidate's possible addition is the retained, released, or embodied return grid and prediction of warnings or aftercare, not therapeutic self-cancellation itself.
near_neighbors.novelty_impact: Major downgrade for the self-undermining side.
near_neighbors.overlap: Very close for self-undermining therapeutic method, especially the idea that a method can cure attachment to theses and then be released.
near_neighbors.source: Joshua William Smith, Snakes and Ladders: Therapy as Liberation in Nagarjuna and Wittgenstein's Tractatus, Sophia 2021, https://philpapers.org/rec/SMISAL-7

near_neighbors.difference: Sells focuses on apophatic discourse, while the candidate tries to make a practitioner-facing cross-tradition return test.
near_neighbors.novelty_impact: Downgrades novelty of the undermine category.
near_neighbors.overlap: Close. Apophatic unsaying already treats language or method as operating by undoing its own claims.
near_neighbors.source: Michael Sells, Mystical Languages of Unsaying, University of Chicago Press, https://press.uchicago.edu/ucp/books/book/chicago/M/bo3635525.html

near_neighbors.difference: VCE does not organize completion by result-standing versus result-undermining and retained, released, or embodied method.
near_neighbors.novelty_impact: Keeps some room for novel synthesis, but only if the rubric predicts aftercare better than VCE's broader influencing-factor domains.
near_neighbors.overlap: Close for the safety and aftercare surface. VCE tracks distress, impairment, appraisals, remedies, teacher guidance, and integration after meditation-related experiences.
near_neighbors.source: Lindahl, Fisher, Cooper, Rosen, and Britton, VCE, https://journals.plos.org/plosone/article?id=10.1371/journal.pone.0176239

near_neighbors.difference: They do not provide the exact return grid or the burnout-facing practice prompt.
near_neighbors.novelty_impact: Downgrades the broad theory. The possible contribution is a narrow testing protocol, not a new account of religious practice.
near_neighbors.overlap: Both anticipate the idea that practice, doctrine, grammar, institution, authority, and correct performance shape what counts as proper use and outcome.
near_neighbors.source: Talal Asad, The Idea of an Anthropology of Islam, https://bpb-ap-se2.wpmucdn.com/thinkspace.csu.edu.au/dist/c/3891/files/2020/10/Asad-Anthropology.pdf, and George Lindbeck summarized at https://people.bu.edu/wwildman/bce/mwt_themes_862_lindbeck.htm

next_loop_instructions: Do not publish as a discovery. Publish, if at all, as a provisional synthesis: test the return, not the peak.
Build a split-source codebook with fields for result stance, method fate, recognition holder, return duty, warning, repair, ordinary conduct, adverse-event risk, and analyst-frame refusal.
Add mandatory anomaly values for practice-realization, radical Other Power, inherited religion, no-threshold practice, no-peak ethical formation, direct recognition, and clinician-held support.
Run a controlled Return Check pilot against generic journaling and rest-and-plan prompts, with special monitoring for rumination, scrupulosity, and burnout.

Close-read Tannisho, Dogen Bendowa or Genjokoan, a Rinzai koan curriculum source, Cloud of Unknowing or Dionysius, a Dzogchen pointing-out source, and one Sufi fana or baqa source before raising source reliability.
novelty_adjustment: Lower novelty from 0.58 to 0.41. The teaching line is strong and publishable only as a restrained synthesis for achievement-contingent self-worth. The research model should be treated as extended prior art until it predicts warnings, repairs, or return duties better than existing upaya, raft, apophatic, practice-realization, spiritual-exercises, VCE, authority, and grammar frameworks.

practitioner_test.answers_that_reduce_originality: Teachers recognize the rubric as ordinary raft teaching, upaya, practice-realization, apophatic unsaying, koan curriculum, spiritual exercise, aftercare, or ethics of fruits, and say it does not predict guidance beyond existing lineage rules.
practitioner_test.answers_that_support_contribution: Teachers can use the grid to predict specific warning or repair patterns across traditions, and burnout-facing practitioners find the check reduces identity pressure without increasing self-monitoring.
questions: Does the retained, released, or embodied return distinction change how you would guide a student after a strong practice experience?
Can you name concrete cases where importing the wrong ending into a method caused harm?
For achievement-driven practitioners, does the Return Check reduce self-proof, or does it add another layer of performance?
relevant_practitioners: Theravada monastics and lay teachers familiar with MN 22 and raft simile
Zen teachers familiar with Dogen practice-realization and Rinzai koan curriculum
Mahayana teachers familiar with Heart Sutra and Prajnaparamita practice
Advaita teachers familiar with Mandukya and svaprakasha language
Jodo Shinshu teachers familiar with Tannisho and Other Power
Meditation safety clinicians familiar with VCE and adverse-event support
Burnout clinicians or coaches working with achievement-contingent self-worth

primary_pair: MN 22 Alagaddupama Sutta, raft simile, Thanissaro Bhikkhu translation, https://www.accesstoinsight.org/tipitaka/mn/mn.022.than.html
Shorter Prajnaparamita Hrdaya Sutra, Wikisource translation, https://en.wikisource.org/wiki/Translation:Shorter_Praj%C3%B1%C4%81p%C4%81ramit%C4%81_H%E1%B9%9Bdaya_S%C5%ABtra
primary_text_close_read.risk_of_overread: High. The model may impose a modern performance and safety rubric on traditions whose own test is surrender, grace, vow, direct recognition, ritual continuity, or inherited participation. It may also moralize return to productivity in a way that worsens burnout if ordinary conduct is confused with more output.
primary_text_close_read.secondary_literature_gap: The audit found strong near-neighbors in Smith on Nagarjuna and Wittgenstein, Sells on unsaying, Asad, Lindbeck, Sharf, VCE, Hadot-style spiritual exercises, Zen oxherding return motifs, and Buddhist raft or upaya literature. It did not read the full books by Smith, Sells, Hadot, Hori, Lindbeck, Katz, or Sharf, and it did not consult original Sanskrit, Pali, Chinese, Japanese, Greek, Latin, Arabic, or Tibetan.
primary_text_close_read.structural_observation: MN 22 is a close primary near-neighbor for validated-then-released method. It teaches right grasp, crossing, and release of the raft, so the candidate's set-down category is old. The Heart Sutra complicates the model because it negates attainment yet retains reliance on Prajnaparamita and mantra. This supports the candidate's claim that undermining result does not always mean abandoning method. Mandukya adds a different pressure: negation culminates in the Self that is to be known. Dogen strains the whole after-completion frame because practice and realization are inseparable, so return is not a later test but the practice itself.

title: The Test Is How You Return
unlike_statement: Unlike the raft simile, apophatic unsaying, therapeutic readings of Nagarjuna and Wittgenstein, Dogen practice-realization, VCE aftercare, Asad's discursive tradition, and Lindbeck's doctrine grammar, this idea's distinct claim is a practical comparative test: code whether a method validates or undermines the result, then code whether the method is retained, released, or embodied, and see whether that interaction predicts warnings, re-entry duties, identity risks, and repairs better than doctrine, institution, teacher style, or clinical-risk variables alone.
